Class MilvusSearchRequest.MilvusBuilder

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.ai.vectorstore.milvus.MilvusSearchRequest.MilvusBuilder
Enclosing class:
MilvusSearchRequest
public static class MilvusSearchRequest.MilvusBuilder extends Object
Builder class for constructing instances of MilvusSearchRequest.
Author:
waileong

      Parameters:

      Returns:
      This builder instance.

      Parameters:

      Returns:

    • build

      public MilvusSearchRequest build()
      Builds and returns a MilvusSearchRequest instance.
      Returns:
      A new MilvusSearchRequest object with the specified parameters.
